summary: Out of 20 MPI Automotive parts missing RRP in the Mufflermen catalogue, only 2 parts have confirmed pricing on the MPI Automotive website: SSMBM840PHD ($493.46 AUD inc GST) and SSMBM833MF ($764.50 AUD inc GST). The remaining 18 parts show RRP $0.00 inc GST on MPI's web store, indicating MPI has not set retail prices for these items. This includes 4 stainless steel muffler/pipe components (SSMBM840MF, SSMBM678MF-BM, SSMBE510, SSMBC475-HUR) and all 14 aluminised steel tubes (1ML-AT* and 3ML-AT* variants). The Mufflermen website (mufflermen.com.au) also displays 'RRP pending' for all 20 parts. Searches across Australian exhaust retailers (Exhaust Shop Australia, Performance Exhaust, DEA Performance, Joondalup Exhaust, Ultimax, ECS Exhaust) found no listings for these specific SKUs with prices. For the 18 unpriced parts, reference pricing from comparable MPI products is provided in the reference_prices section to assist with estimation. Recommendation: Contact MPI Automotive directly (sales@mpiautomotive.com or 1300 310 330) to request RRP pricing for the 18 outstanding parts, as they appear to be priced on application (POA) or simply not yet configured in MPI's e-commerce system.
